title: Perfect Colors
description: Perfect Colors is a mod that add blocks and slabs with all the concrete colors but perfectly
body:
# Perfect Colors

### Perfect Colors is a mod that add blocks and slabs with all the concrete colors but perfectly

![All the blocks and slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Iq5Csvxc/images/4065501ff47a974434497f793dfaf5d2eb44d45d.png)

#

⚠️ Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)  
⚠️ For now, blocks and slabs are not craftable, you can only get them in creative mode !
